Platform: Retail app square product card
Required canvas: 1200 x 1200 px
Required aspect ratio: 1:1 square
Old conflicting platform to ignore: Web hero banner 1440 x 480.
Top safe zone: 80 px.
Bottom safe zone: 100 px.
Side safe margin: 72 px.
Logo: top-left safe area.
CTA: bottom-right safe area.
Text density: no more than 6 short text blocks; headline should be largest and at most 2 lines.
Hero: must stay readable without covering CTA, disclosure, or source line.
